The embroidered logo/patch design differs significantly from the source - source shows a more abstract/skull-like floral design while generated shows a clearly defined rose with banner/ribbon underneath
The material appears more like leather or faux leather in the generated image rather than the satin/nylon bomber material visible in the source
The chest logo design does not match the intricate graphic present on the source reference image.
The garment's primary material has been incorrectly rendered as leather, significantly deviating from the satin/shiny nylon appearance of the source reference image.
all_fixes: Match the embroidery/patch design more closely to the source - it appears to be a skull with floral elements, not a single rose with banner
Adjust the material rendering to show satin/nylon bomber fabric with natural wrinkles rather than smooth leather-like appearance
Make the ribbed knit cuffs and hem more prominent and textured
Improve pocket visibility to match the source's more defined welt pocket openings
Add the brand label at the inner collar area as seen in the source
Soften the hood construction to appear more relaxed and natural
Replace the current chest logo with an accurate rendition of the intricate graphic from the source reference image.
Adjust the garment's texture and sheen to correctly depict a black satin or shiny nylon material, matching the source reference's visual characteristics and drape.
